- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Requirements clarified: React Native app with Firebase, tabs for Home, MySpace, Fixtures, Settings.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created Expo project, installed basic deps, set up folder structure with src/screens, components, etc. Created navigation with bottom tabs.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Applied basic navigation, screens, Firebase setup, types. UI uses white background with simple design.

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed dependencies, ran Expo start. Warnings on package versions but functional.

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	No task needed for Expo project.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Started Expo server on web at http://localhost:8081.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with setup instructions.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
